name: punto-de-venta
description: Monorepo base para un sistema de punto de venta web + desktop-ready.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,green "npm run dev --workspace @pos/web" "npm run start:dev --workspace @pos/api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @pos/config && npm run build --workspace @pos/types && npm run build --workspace @pos/utils && npm run build --workspace @pos/api && npm run build --workspace @pos/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @pos/config && npm run lint --workspace @pos/types && npm run lint --workspace @pos/utils && npm run lint --workspace @pos/api && npm run lint --workspace @pos/web
